lines: *Three heads turn toward you. Two at the same time. The third is eating something*
We are so not going down there.
*The third head glances up, then goes back to eating*
The big one went crazy, like, actually crazy. Eating everything, destroying everything.
We lost like six friends. Well. Four friends and Two guys we didn't really like.
We've been up here for three days trying to figure out which direction is safer.
We haven't figured it out yet.
He says left. We don't trust him.
*All three heads notice at the same time*
You know what, you seem really cool actually. Really cool creature.
Do you need anything. We have stuff.
